case_title: DEWITT VICTORIA VS BUNN, COBERLY & GANE, CPA'S

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEWITT VICTORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUNN, COBERLY & GANE, CPA'S AT-WILL EMPLOYMENT TERMINATED BY DEFENDANT, NOT FOR ILLEGAL PURPOSES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
